arts.ttl: Real Madrid man has played last game for club after Carlo Ancelotti decision
arts.sum: Real Madrid defender Jesus Vallejo is the forgotten man of the Santiago Bernabeu, and has barely been mentioned in recent months save for his absence in the Copa del Rey against Deportiva Minera. However he is not predicted to exit his ostracism before the end of the season. Los Blancos have suffered their worst injury […] The post Real Madrid man has played last game for club after Carlo Ancelotti decision appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Confirmed: Real Madrid are not negotiating for Liverpool ace
arts.sum: It’s bound to be a busy summer for Liverpool, whether or not they win the title, but one player of theirs that Real Madrid are not after is Virgil van Dijk. Trent Alexander-Arnold has teased a move to Los Blancos with his latest comments, and even though reports linked van Dijk with a move to […] The post Confirmed: Real Madrid are not negotiating for Liverpool ace appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Karim Benzema reveals task he set himself after Cristiano Ronaldo left Real Madrid - as he opens up on feelings around his own shock exit
arts.sum: Ronaldo had been the main man at the Santiago Bernabeu for the best part of a decade but more pressure fell on Benzema's shoulders when the Portuguese left.

arts.ttl: Liverpool fear SECOND Real Madrid raid after Alexander-Arnold transfer
arts.sum: Alexander-Arnold looks likely to sign for Real on a free transfer when his contract with Liverpool runs out in the summer, with the 26-year-old still reluctant to commit his future to the Reds despite their title push this season. Liverpool could find themselves losing two of their key players to Real Madrid in the near future with reports that the Spanish giants are looking to follow up their interest in Trent Alexander-Arnold with an approach for another Anfield favourite.

arts.ttl: Arda Güler mysteriously disappears from Real Madrid’s plans
arts.sum: The only minutes he has seen recently came in the Copa del Rey against Leganés, where he started and played 76 minutes but failed to make a lasting impact. He went from featuring in seven of Madrid’s first eight Champions League and La Liga matches to not playing a single minute in the knockout rounds .

arts.ttl: 14 Players have played for Real Madrid and Real Sociedad — some made history and some fell short
arts.sum: Xabi Alonso, the most decorated of them all, spent his formative years at Sociedad, playing 124 games and scoring 10 goals before Madrid brought him in as the midfield orchestrator of their second Galáctico era. Martin Ødegaard also found his footing in San Sebastián, playing 36 times in 2019 and recording 7 goals and 9 assists after struggling for minutes at Madrid (491 minutes across 11 games).

arts.ttl: Benzema: “I preferred to leave Real Madrid at the right time”
arts.sum: Former Real Madrid forward Karim Benzema gave an interview to journalist Edu Aguirre recently, where he talked about a lot of things, ranging from leaving the club, to becoming a leader at the club after Cristiano Ronaldo’s departure. Benzema — whose full interview will be released on Sunday, talked about his first season at the club, and how much Florentino Perez helped him during his time there.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds defender emerges as surprise target for PSG, Real Madrid?
arts.sum: Liverppol defender Ibrahima Konate reportedly emerges as a transfer target for European giants Paris Saint-Germain and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad vs. Real Madrid: Head-to-head record and past meetings ahead of Copa del Rey semi-final
arts.sum: Ahead of Wednesday's Copa del Rey clash between Real Sociedad and Real Madrid, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: New photos of Real Madrid’s 2025/26 home kit surface online
arts.sum: A fresh round of photos of the jersey set to be made use of by La Liga champions Real Madrid in home fixtures next season have come to the fore…
